response:
```sql
SELECT DISTINCT c.name AS country_name
FROM world_1.country c
JOIN world_1.continent co ON c.continent_id = co.id
WHERE co.name = 'Africa'
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM world_1.country a
    JOIN world_1.continent asia ON a.continent_id = asia.id
    WHERE asia.name = 'Asia'
    AND a.population < c.population
);
```
